Subject: Cannot access my account after password reset
Body: Customer reset their password but still cannot login. Getting invalid credentials error.
Answer: Verify email address is correct. Check spam folder for reset email. Try resetting password again and wait 5 minutes before logging in.

Subject: Charged twice for same order
Body: Customer was charged twice for the same order. Wants refund for duplicate charge.
Answer: Verify duplicate charge in payment system. Process refund for duplicate transaction. Send confirmation email to customer.

Subject: How to upgrade my subscription plan
Body: Customer wants to know how to upgrade from basic to premium plan and what the price difference is.
Answer: Go to Account Settings, click Subscription, select Premium plan and follow the upgrade steps. Price difference is charged immediately on a prorated basis.
